source_pattern: LogOS runtime namespace /reson8 and 9P2000.L state surface
authority_boundary: Engineering namespace only. No formal, physical, or scientific authority is inherited from LogOS claims.

paths./sesf/inputs: Input files, bundle globs, and external source descriptors.
paths./sesf/bundles: Per-file hashes, bundle SHA-256, chunk membership, and bundle receipts.
paths./sesf/units: Unit-mode declarations, conversion manifests, and dimensional quarantine records.
paths./sesf/diagnostics: Computed numerical diagnostics and skipped diagnostic reasons.
paths./sesf/receipts: Authority-bearing JSON receipts with SHA-256 provenance and dependency metadata.
paths./sesf/validation: Benchmark IDs, external dataset references, and reproduction status.
paths./sesf/quarantine: Fields, diagnostics, or claims refused by policy.
paths./sesf/status: E0-E5 evidence-gate state and promotion-blocking defects.

quarantined: formal verification claims without proof artifacts

evidence_gates.E1: Real external HDF5 solver output ingested with receipt
evidence_gates.E2: Accepted diagnostic safely computed from real data
